  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 3,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un wiꞥſch darrija/ kas tam
MINGAM labbi patikke/ to-
mehr ne ta ka winna Tehws
Dahwids/ bet ittin ka winna
tehws Joas/ ta patt darrija
wiꞥſch arri.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 4,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tee Angſtumi ween ne
tappe nopohſtiti/ tee Laudis up-
pureja un kwehpinaja wehl us
teem Angſtumeem.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 5,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Kad nu wiꞥſch eekſch fa-
was Walſtibas bij ſtiprinajees/
tad karve wiꞥſch tawus Kalpus/
kas winna Tehwu to Kehninu
bij nokawuſcht.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 6,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Bet to Slepkawu Behr-
nus wiꞥſch ne nokawe/ ittin ka
rakſtihts irr eekſch Mohsus Baut-
lbas Grabmatas/ fur tas
kungs pawehlejs/ fazziſams:
Teem Tehweem ne buhs preekſch
teem Behrneem nokautoem tapt/
nedß teem Behrneem buhs
preekſch teem Tehweem nokan-
teem tapt/ bet ikkatram buhs fa-
wn paschn Grehku deht nokan-
kam tapt.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 7,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Wiꞥſch kawe no teem Ge-
domiteeem defnuts tuhſtoschus
Sahls-Eeleiſa/ un usnebme Se-
lu kandamees/ un noẜauze wiꞥ-
ras Wahrdu Jokteeli lihds ſcho-
deem.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 8,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tad fuhttija Amazijus
Wehſinetchnus pee Joatu/ Joa-
afa Jeuſa Dehla Dehlu/to Isra-
ela Kehninu/ un liike fazziht:
"
    },
    {
      "n": 9,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Bet Joas tas Israē
Kehniſch fuhttija us Amaziju
Kehninu no Juha/ un likke ſo-
ziht: Tas Ehrſchku-Kruhm
kas us Libbann irr/ fuhttija p
to Zeedra-Kohku/kas us Libba-
irr/ fazziſams: Dohd tawn Ma-
tu manniam Dehlam par Sa-
wu. Bet tee Lauka Sweh-
kas usLibbann irr/gabje pahri/u-
faminne to Ehrſchku-Kruhm
"
    },
    {
      "n": 10,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tu gann effi tohs Ged-
miteus kawis/ tapehz tar-
Sir̈ds leppojaſs. Paturr
Gohdu/ un paleez Mahjās/
pehz gribbi tu us Laununu do-
tees/ un Juha ar tewim?
"
    },
    {
      "n": 11,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Bet Amazijus ne klaufi-
Tad gabje Joas Israēta &-
niſch us angſchn/ un wiꞥſch
Amazijus tas Kehniſch no Ju-
da baudijahs weens ar oht-
eekſch Betſeenes/ kas eekſch Ju-
da irr.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 12,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un Juha tappe kants
fraeka Breckſcha/ un tee beh-
ikkatrs fawa Dsihwokli.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 13,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un Joas tas Israē
Kehniſch fagubſtija Amazi-
Joasa Akasijus Dehta Dehlu/
Kehninu no Juha eekſch Betſ-
mes/ un natze uhs Jeruſalem
un nolaſſja pee Jeruſalem
Muhteem tſchetrfimts Ohlektt
no Eewraima Wahrtun li-
tahm Stuhraſ-Wahrtun.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 14,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un wiꞥſch nehme wi-
Selu ua Sudrabu/ un wiﬀ-
"
    }
